text:
There was a small town full of chipmunks. They loved going on tours. One day, they saw something incredible: an eagle soaring across a snowy field.

"Wow!" they all squeaked.

That night, the eagles flew them out. They saw stars they couldn't see in their own forest!

"Gosh," said an owl. "We want to see the world!"

So they flew south, visiting everywhere. They loved New Orleans. They enjoyed jazz.

"The eagle feather!" they cried.

Back home, they started a feather collection.

One windy day, they saw an owl missing a feather. "Could it be one of yours?"

They tracked it. It was an endangered owl. They saved it.

For years they watched it grow. They even named it Olive.

"You're the best!" Olive would say.

Every year, they decorated for Olive.


One December. They flew south once more.

But Olive couldn't. They flew north. Into winter.

They never saw her
